response:
No two adjacent words can start with consecutive letters of the alphabet.

To find the speed, we maximize power \(N = Fv\).
Substitute \(F\):
\[ N = \frac{B S \rho (v_0 - v)^2 v}{2} \]
Differentiate \(N\) with respect to \(v\) and set to zero:
\[ \frac{dN}{dv} \propto (v_0 - v)^2 + v \cdot 2(v_0 - v)(-1) = 0 \]
\[ (v_0 - v) [ (v_0 - v) - 2v ] = 0 \]
\[ v_0 - 3v = 0 \implies v = \frac{v_0}{3} \]
Given \(v_0 = 6.3\):
\[ v = \frac{6.3}{3} = 2.1 \]

The speed is 2.1 m/s.
